title: Group Ownership & Secure Admin System
summary: Complete overhaul of group ownership, admin verification, and permission rules. Includes a secure hash-based ownership token, delete queue with countdown, animated role badges, inline role management, room info card with ratings, and full debug console instrumentation throughout.

changes.title: Secure Ownership Token
changes.description: Every new group now stores a deterministic SHA-256 ownership token in its manifest (SHA-256 of uid:room:createdAt:salt). The token is verified on every role load and after every ownership transfer, producing a clear integrity status: ok, no-token (legacy rooms), or token-mismatch (tamper warning).

changes.title: Immutable Creator Record
changes.description: The manifest now permanently stores createdBy and createdByName as the original creator's identity — fields that are never overwritten, even after an ownership transfer. The current owner is tracked separately in ownerUid and ownerUsername, providing a clean audit trail across all group actions.

changes.title: verifyRoomOwnership — Full Ownership Audit
changes.description: New verifyRoomOwnership() function performs a fresh re-fetch of the manifest and admins list from the repo (bypassing all caches), re-derives the expected ownership token, validates it, and returns a complete verification report including ownerIsMe, adminIsMe, integrity status, and admin count. Called after every room creation and available for any sensitive admin action.

changes.title: Post-Creation Ownership Verification
changes.description: After a group is successfully created, the system automatically runs ownership verification and shows a dedicated 'Verifying ownership…' progress step. The result is logged to the debug console under [CreateRoom] in blue.

changes.title: Delete Queue with Animated Countdown
changes.description: Message deletion is now queued through a serialised Promise chain (enqueueMessageDelete) that prevents SHA conflicts with concurrent writes. Before any delete, a full-screen animated countdown ring (5 seconds by default) gives the user a chance to Cancel or trigger the delete immediately with the '🗑️ Now' button.

changes.title: Optimistic Delete with Rollback
changes.description: The message is removed from the DOM instantly for immediate feedback. If the cloud write fails (network error, conflict after 4 attempts), the original message is fully restored in the DOM and an error toast is shown. No stale or ghost messages left behind.

changes.title: Role Badges on Messages
changes.description: Messages sent by the room owner now show an amber '👑 Owner' pill in the message meta. Messages from admins show a purple '🛡️ Admin' pill. Badges are derived from the in-memory roles cache and load asynchronously without blocking the message feed.

changes.title: Inline Role Management in Members Panel
changes.description: The room owner can now promote or demote members directly from the Members panel without opening the admin settings. A '🛡️ Promote' or '📉 Demote' button appears on each eligible member row. Role changes atomically update the member record, the admins.json list, and immediately refresh the roles cache.

changes.title: Room Info Card
changes.description: Clicking any room in Browse Rooms now opens a full-screen info card before joining. The card shows the room banner and photo, owner reputation score, description with 'Read more' expand, stats grid (member count, message count — each hideable by the owner), settings summary pills, room rules, and a full rating section with 👍/👎 + comments and a paginated review list.

changes.title: Room & Owner Rating System
changes.description: Users can rate a room (👍 / 👎 + optional comment) and separately rate the room's owner as a person. Ratings are stored as atomic append-writes in rooms-meta/{room}/ratings.json and users/{uid}/profile-ratings.json. The owner reputation score is calculated as a percentage of positive ratings and shown on the info card.

changes.title: Room Description & Privacy Toggles
changes.description: Room owners can write a description (up to 1000 characters) in room settings. Two new privacy toggles control whether the member count and message count are shown publicly on the info card.

changes.title: Complete Metadata on Room Creation
changes.description: createRoomWithMeta now writes settings.json (with ownerUid pre-filled) and admins.json (empty array) at creation time — in addition to the manifest, index, boxes, and cells. New rooms have complete metadata from day one, so all permission checks work immediately without fallbacks.

changes.title: Smarter isRoomOwner / isRoomAdmin
changes.description: isRoomOwner now checks the roles cache first (populated from manifest ownerUid), falling back to the visibility cache. isRoomAdmin uses the cached adminUids Set when available, eliminating redundant admins.json fetches on every admin-gated action. Both functions correctly distinguish owner from admin.

changes.title: Ownership Transfer Preserves Creator
changes.description: transferRoomOwnership generates a fresh ownership token for the new owner, stores the previous owner's UID as previousOwnerUid for a one-deep audit trail, updates settings.json ownerUid in sync, and forces a roles cache refresh so isRoomOwner reflects the change immediately — all without touching the immutable createdBy record.

changes.title: Online / Offline Status in Members Panel
changes.description: The Members panel now separates members into '🟢 ONLINE' and '⚫ OFFLINE / AWAY' sections with live presence indicators. Each member row shows their exact status (Online now, Last seen N seconds ago) based on the 35-second presence heartbeat window.

changes.title: Admin Exclusion from adminUids Set
changes.description: The owner's UID is now explicitly excluded from the adminUids Set when loading roles, since ownership always supersedes admin. This prevents edge cases where a transferred owner could appear redundantly in both sets.

changes.title: Missing Brace in buildMemberRow
changes.description: Fixed a missing closing brace for the if(isAdmin && !isMe && !isOwner) block in buildMemberRow that could cause role management buttons to render incorrectly for certain member combinations.

changes.title: Debug Console Instrumentation
changes.description: Full colour-coded debug logging across all new systems: [CreateRoom] (blue) for 9-step creation progress, [RoomRoles] (purple) for role loads with integrity status, [OwnerVerify] (violet) for ownership verification results, [OwnerTransfer] (violet/green) for transfer steps, [DeleteQueue] (red) for queue depth and dequeue events, [DeleteMsg] for atomic PUT attempts, [RoleChange] (purple/green) for promote/demote actions, [RoomRating] (violet) and [ProfileRating] (pink) for rating writes.
